canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating the generative performance of video-based conversational models on criteria such as correctness, detail, and contextual understanding.
papers: Artemis:  Towards Referential Understanding in Complex Videos

definitions.text: A benchmark for evaluating the generative performance of video-based conversational models on criteria such as correctness, detail, and contextual understanding.
A test set designed for evaluating detailed video understanding via large vision and language models, used here to assess general video question answering performance.
definitions.paper: Artemis:  Towards Referential Understanding in Complex Videos
